---
title: "Model Evaluation and Performance Metrics Review"
subtitle: "Metrics, Thresholds, Calibration, Error, and Monitoring"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Evaluation question

State the model task, intended use, and prediction target.

## Metric alignment

Explain why the selected metrics match the task.

## Reproducible example

```{python}
models = 4
approved = 1
in_review = 2
needs_revision = 1
print({
    "models": models,
    "approved_share": approved / models,
    "review_or_revision_share": (in_review + needs_revision) / models
})
```

## Threshold policy

Document the threshold, false-positive cost, false-negative cost, review capacity, and decision owner.

## Calibration and probability quality

Review Brier score, log loss, and calibration curve.

## Regression error

Review MAE, RMSE, bias, and tail error where applicable.

## Monitoring

Track performance and drift across windows.

## Appendix

Preserve source predictions, metric definitions, thresholds, and governance decisions.
